raw: {"trigger_ref": "019db163-d414-7001-a0d0-1bc72873096e", "tenant_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "claim_ops": [], "reasoning_trace": "The signal announces a PR for refund flow is ready for review, with intent to ship tomorrow.
